chunks.title: David Saves Keilah
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit where David seeks God's direction and delivers the city of Keilah from the Philistines.

chunks.title: David Escapes Saul at Keilah
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative block detailing the arrival of Abiathar, Saul's pursuit, David's inquiry about the city's loyalty, and their subsequent departure.

chunks.title: Jonathan Strengthens David
chunks.reason: A distinct scene focusing on the relationship between Jonathan and David, including their covenant at Horesh.

chunks.title: The Ziphites Betray David
chunks.reason: A focused exchange between the Ziphites and Saul regarding David's location, followed by their movement to Maon.

chunks.title: The Rock of Escape
chunks.reason: The climax of the chase where David and Saul encircle each other on a mountain, interrupted by the Philistine raid.
